arts.ttl: Why Leon Bailey is not included in Aston Villa squad as injury problems continue
arts.sum: Aston Villa winger Leon Bailey misses this afternoon's Premier League clash against Ipswich Town due to injury Aston Villa have suffered a fresh injury blow as Leon Bailey has not been included in the matchday squad to face Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: 'Probably useless' - Aston Villa anger revealed as Premier League and FA slammed - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aston Villa are deeply upset about the Premier League's fixture scheduling which will see them play four league matches in the space of 10 days As Villa only play one league match in March, the club requested that the game against Liverpool was pushed back into late in the season, but the Premier League rejected it.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle and Villa looking to raid top-four rivals for €50m-rated forward
arts.sum: Arsenal, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are keen on signing the Chelsea striker Nicolas Jackson at the end of the season. The former Villarreal striker has shown improvement this season and he has done reasonably well for the Blues. AS have an interview with the 21-year-old today as he continues to shine in LaLiga 2 and earn himself admirers. arts.ttl: What Monchi kept telling Morgan Rogers as Aston Villa transfer truth revealed
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers has revealed Unai Emery is more demanding of him the better he performs for Aston Villa . Aston Villa forward Morgan Rogers is excited to continue playing his role in helping the club reach the "next level"

arts.ttl: Former Man United coach makes Marcus Rashford prediction after Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Ipswich Town Kieran McKenna has predicted Marcus Rashford to rediscover his form at Aston Villa after joining on loan from Manchester United . Villa have a £40m option to buy Rashford in the summer when his loan move comes to an end, and Ipswich boss McKenna - who worked with him when he was a first-team coach at United under Jose Mourinho and Ole Gunnar Solskjaer - has backed the forward to find his feet again.

arts.sum: Sil Swinkels: He joined League One side Bristol Rovers on loan for the remainder of the season at the start of this month. Lino Sousa: The left-back joined Villa 13 months ago, but struggled for game time at Championship side Plymouth in the second half of last season.
